settings.heading: What is included
settings.content: The product description outlines the exact inclusions for this service, template, toolkit or support option.

settings.heading: Delivery and fulfilment
settings.content: Digital resources are delivered through the store or order email. Service and supported options may require intake, review, booking or manual delivery before completion.

settings.heading: Best for
settings.content: Use this option when the product description and selected package match the business issue, delivery model and support level you need.

settings.heading: Important notes
settings.content: Templates, toolkits and documentation are general business resources and are not legal, financial or compliance advice. Supported options help structure execution but do not guarantee regulatory, commercial or technical outcomes.

settings.heading: Compare the package, delivery and support level
settings.text: Use this section to confirm what is included, how the option is delivered, who it is best for and what boundaries apply before checkout or enquiry.
settings.included_text: The product description outlines the exact inclusions for this service, template, toolkit or support option.
settings.delivery_text: Digital resources are delivered through the store or order email. Service and supported options may require intake, review, booking or manual delivery before completion.
settings.best_for_text: Businesses that need practical documentation, decision support, implementation help or ongoing operating support without starting a larger engagement first.
settings.notes_text: Check the selected package, availability and any intake requirements before checkout or enquiry.
settings.boundary_text: Templates, toolkits and documentation are general business resources and are not legal, financial or compliance advice. Supported and deployed options help structure execution but do not guarantee regulatory, commercial or technical outcomes.
